# Thijs van As

> Personal website of Thijs van As — product builder, currently at Relay.app.

This is the personal website of Thijs van As at https://tvanas.nl (previously hosted at pretopia.net).

## About

Thijs van As is a product builder currently working at Relay.app, making AI workflows simple and accessible. Previously, he built products at Google (Gmail, Google Flights, Google Maps) and led product for Booking.com's mobile app.

## Shipped products

- Gmail Add-ons (2016): Cross-platform framework for third-party apps inside Gmail — https://workspace.google.com/blog/developers-practitioners/bring-power-of-your-apps-into-gmail_9
- Inbox by Gmail: Smart Bundles (2015): Grouped related emails into Trip, Newsletter, and Event experiences — https://gmail.googleblog.com/2015/06/trip-bundles-in-inbox-by-gmail.html
- Gmail Attachments (2013): The attachment and viewer experience still used in Gmail today — https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/gmail/attachments-in-gmail-now-with-power-of/
- Google Flights: Price Insights (2018): ML-based "low/typical/high" pricing UI — https://edition.cnn.com/travel/article/thanksgiving-2018-flights/index.html

## FPGA projects

- ρ-VEX (2008): Open source extensible VLIW processor, designed for MSc thesis — https://github.com/tvanas/r-vex · thesis: https://tvanas.nl/files/thesis_tvanas.pdf · paper: https://tvanas.nl/files/r-vex_icfpt08.pdf
- arkanoid-vhdl (2007): Arkanoid implemented entirely in hardware (VHDL) — https://github.com/tvanas/arkanoid-vhdl
- uart-vhdl (2008): Minimal RS232 communication controller — https://github.com/tvanas/uart-vhdl
- MIDI synthesizer (2007): Monophonic MIDI synthesizer for digital audio synthesis

## HTML5 games

Built around 2010 when the canvas element was new. All playable at:

- BrickIt: https://tvanas.nl/brickit — Arkanoid-style brick breaker
- BounceIt: https://tvanas.nl/bounceit — Endless vertical jumper
- FloodIt: https://tvanas.nl/floodit — Color flood puzzle
- SweepIt: https://tvanas.nl/sweepit — Minimalist Minesweeper
- SnakeIt: https://tvanas.nl/snakeit — Nokia-style snake game

Source code: https://github.com/tvanas/html5-games

- GitHub: https://github.com/tvanas
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/tvanas/
- X/Twitter: https://x.com/tvanas
- Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/tvanas.nl
